◈ epost_agent_kit
Agents CLI Workflows Install GitHub
All Workflows
End-to-End Automation

PO-to-Prototype Pipeline

Product Owner describes a feature. Agents plan it, build it, audit it, fix it, and deliver a PR with working code — end to end.

epost-planner epost-fullstack-developer epost-code-reviewer epost-tester epost-git-manager

The Pipeline

1

Intake

orchestrator ~5s
input

PO describes feature in natural language

output

Parsed intent, platform detection, complexity estimate

2

Plan

epost-planner ~2 min
input

Feature description + codebase context

output

Phased plan with file ownership, status.md tracking

3

Build

epost-fullstack-developer ~10 min
input

Plan phases dispatched in parallel

output

Working code on feature branch

4

Audit

epost-code-reviewer ~2 min
input

Changed files from build phase

output

Quality report, security scan, spec compliance

5

Fix

epost-fullstack-developer ~5 min
input

Audit findings with severity ≥ warning

output

Fix commits, updated tests

6

Ship

epost-git-manager ~30s
input

Clean branch with passing audit

output

PR with summary, test plan, demo branch link

What the PO Sees

PO types one sentence

"Add a notification preferences page where users can toggle email and push notifications per category"

What gets delivered (~20 min later)
✓3-phase plan with file ownership
✓API: POST /notifications/preferences
✓React page with toggle components
✓Redux slice + API integration
✓Unit tests + integration test
✓A11y: keyboard nav, ARIA labels
✓PR #312 ready for review

Artifacts Generated

plans/[id]/plan.md Phased implementation plan
plans/[id]/status.md Living progress tracker
Feature branch Working code with tests
Pull Request Summary + audit report + test plan
reports/[id].md Full audit trail
◈

The Loop Closes Itself

The audit phase feeds findings back to the developer agent. The developer fixes issues and the auditor re-checks. This loop repeats until quality thresholds pass — no human needed for mechanical fixes. Humans review intent, architecture, and UX. Machines handle compliance, patterns, and standards.

◈ epost_agent_kit v2.0.0
Works with any AI coding assistant
